# render-contributions

Contributes the `Contributions.FacetTable` "Structure" tab to the Studio Contributions view: one
row per plugin that has a structural anomaly — a non-standard folder, a stray
top-level source file, or a self-declared composition root. Conformant plugins
are excluded, so the tab badge counts anomalous plugins. Reads
`node.facets["structure"]` for every plugin.

The table sets `onRowClick`, so clicking a row pushes that plugin's detail pane
(`pluginViewPane`), where the migrated Structure section shows the same
anomalies in context.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin structure-anomaly table in the Studio Contributions view.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Contributions.FacetTable` "Structure", `Contributions.RowClick` "structure"
  - Uses: `plugin-meta/contributions-table.Contributions`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.defineFacetTable`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.defineRowClick`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.FacetTableEntry`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.PluginChip`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view.pluginViewPane`
